recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.overview: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online.

recommendations.title: Loving
recommendations.overview: Laura and Carlos love each other as if every day was the last, and perhaps that first love intensity is what will tear them apart a year later.

recommendations.title: Catch and Release
recommendations.overview: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

recommendations.title: Love at First Kiss
recommendations.overview: The story of Javier who, at the age of 16, while kissing a girl for the first time, realized that he had a gift of romantic clairvoyance. Javier can see the future... and he finally knows who the love of his life is.

recommendations.title: On Golden Pond
recommendations.overview: For Norman and Ethel Thayer, this summer on golden pond is filled with conflict and resolution. When their daughter Chelsea arrives, the family is forced to renew the bonds of love and overcome the generational friction that has existed for years.

recommendations.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
recommendations.overview: Three friends who were inseparable in childhood decide to go on a three-week-long bachelor road trip to Spain, in order to re-establish their bond and explore thrilling adventures, before one of them gets married. What will they learn of themselves a

recommendations.title: Bangalore Days
recommendations.overview: A fun roller coaster ride about three young people, Aju, Divya and Kuttan who are cousins, reach Bangalore to dream, discover & explore!

recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah
